blocks.text: Glimt march to San Siro with a stunning 3-1 lead — history beckons
Bodo/Glimt need only a draw tomorrow to reach the last 16 — a result that would stand as the greatest night in Norwegian club football history.

blocks.label: ⚽ Tuesday & Wednesday second legs
items: ⚽ Tue 18:45 — Club Brugge at Atlético Madrid — all square, anything can happen
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Monaco at PSG — Monaco trail 3-2, one away goal changes everything
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Benfica at Real Madrid — narrow lead, nervy second leg expected
